_comment: Schema for the hermes-registry repo. Place this as registry.json at the repo root (branch: main). The Discover tab fetches it from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fathah/hermes-registry/main/registry.json. Every item needs a unique `id` within its kind; everything else is optional but improves the card.
